definition:
1. going round, compassing, encircling , (Euripides) 
2. as Substantive, περίβολος = περιβολή, ἐχίδνης περίβολοι the spires  or coils  of a serpent, (Euripides); in plural walls round a town , (Herdotus Historicus); so in singular, (Thucydides) 
3. an enclosure, circuit, compass , π. νεωρίων (Euripides); of a temple, the precincts , (Plutarch) (ML)
